breakout_products.title: Superset 2.0
breakout_products.content: Run 100s of coding agents on any machine from anywhere. Run 100s of coding agents in parallel. Superset is a turbocharged IDE that allows you to run any coding agents to 10x your development workflow. - Run multiple agents simultaneously without context switching overhead - Isolate each task in its own sandbox so agents don't interfere with each other - Monitor all your agents from one place and get notified when they need attention - Review changes quickly with built-in diff viewer and editor Wait less, ship more. Product categories: Text Editors, Developer Tools, Artificial Intelligence.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Superset 2.0 enables running hundreds of parallel coding agents in isolated sandboxes.
breakout_products.summary: Superset is an integrated development environment designed to execute and manage hundreds of isolated coding agents simultaneously.
breakout_products.display_title: A Turbocharged IDE for Running Hundreds of Coding Agents in Parallel Sandboxes
key_points: Executes multiple coding agents in parallel without context-switching overhead.
Isolates individual tasks within dedicated sandboxes to prevent agent interference.
Includes a centralized monitoring dashboard and a built-in diff viewer for reviewing code changes.

breakout_products.title: QClaw 海外版有点东西，体验很不错 可以直接调用本机 Claude Code 技能，为我干活 试了一下我的写作工作流： 我在咖啡店用手机发了个任务 “看下今天保存的推文，选一个最适合写的 A...
breakout_products.content: QClaw 海外版有点东西，体验很不错 可以直接调用本机 Claude Code 技能，为我干活 试了一下我的写作工作流： 我在咖啡店用手机发了个任务 “看下今天保存的推文，选一个最适合写的 AI 产品动态。写一条 X 推文串，再写公众号初稿，最后跑一遍去 AI 味和发布前检查。” 过一会，文件已经躺在 Obsidian 里了...
breakout_products.selection_reason: QClaw integrates Claude Code into mobile workflows for automated content creation and Obsidian sync.
breakout_products.summary: QClaw enables users to remotely trigger local Claude Code capabilities from their mobile devices to automate complex content creation workflows.
breakout_products.display_title: Mobile Task Delegation Tool Triggers Local Claude Code Workflows Remotely
key_points: Allows users to dispatch multi-step tasks from a mobile phone to a local machine running Claude Code.
Automates end-to-end writing workflows, including content selection, drafting, and pre-publication editing.
Seamlessly delivers the final generated outputs directly into local knowledge management tools like Obsidian.

breakout_products.title: Gas City 1.0
breakout_products.content: build your own software factory. The successor to Gas Town, Gas City is the OSS platform software engineers use to build software factories that builds, deploys, operates, and maintains their software products. Orchestrate your favorite CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and more) to their non-deterministic output into product-quality solutions. features, schedule, quality: pick three. Product categories: AI Coding Agents, AI Workflow Automation.
breakout_products.selection_reason: OSS platform for orchestrating multiple CLI coding agents into production workflows.
breakout_products.summary: Gas City is an open-source platform that allows engineers to orchestrate various command-line coding agents to build, deploy, and maintain software products.
breakout_products.display_title: Open-Source Platform Orchestrates CLI Coding Agents to Automate Software Factories
key_points: Serves as the successor to Gas Town for creating automated software development factories.
Orchestrates popular CLI coding agents like Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini into unified workflows.
Transforms non-deterministic AI outputs into reliable, product-quality software solutions.

breakout_products.title: Contrario
breakout_products.content: The AI recruiting platform powered by expert recruiters. Recruiting tools won't get you the hire. The right team will. Contrario combines a network of expert recruiters with AI agents built for hiring. Our recruiters and agents handle 90% of the work — sourcing, screening, coordination, and closing — all from Slack via natural language. With every decision, the system learns your bar and surfaces better candidates over time. Product categories: Hiring software, Marketplace sites.
breakout_products.selection_reason: AI-native recruiting platform combining expert networks with Slack-integrated agents.
breakout_products.summary: A aI-native recruiting platform combining expert networks adds Slack-integrated agents.
breakout_products.display_title: AI-native recruiting platform combining expert networks Adds Slack-integrated agents
key_points: The AI recruiting platform powered by expert recruiters.
Recruiting tools won't get you the hire.
The right team will.

breakout_products.title: Bryan Johnson spends $2M a year manually running an algorithm on his own body. Dreamspan is putti...
breakout_products.content: Bryan Johnson spends $2M a year manually running an algorithm on his own body. Dreamspan is putting that algorithm into a product. > adaptive sleep environment, not a tracker > temperature self-corrects through the night > smart alarm that doesn't wake your partner > built and manufactured in India, sold globally SpanOS for your bedroom. the longevity stack just became accessible.
breakout_products.selection_reason: Dreamspan launches SpanOS, an AI-driven adaptive sleep environment for health optimization.
breakout_products.summary: Dreamspan offers an adaptive sleep environment powered by SpanOS that automatically regulates nighttime temperature and features a partner-friendly smart alarm to make advanced longevity routines more accessible.
breakout_products.display_title: Dreamspan Launches an Adaptive Sleep Environment with Auto-Correcting Temperature Controls
key_points: Functions as an active sleep environment rather than a passive tracker by running a dedicated operating system called SpanOS.
Automatically adjusts and self-corrects the bed's temperature throughout the night to maintain optimal resting conditions.
Features a localized smart alarm designed to wake the user without disturbing their partner, manufactured in India for global distribution.

breakout_products.title: Gyro Autopilot
breakout_products.content: 100s of Dollars Could Be Sitting in Your Inbox 📥. Scan your inbox for unclaimed flight money from delays, cancellations, overbookings, and more. Gyro Autopilot finds what you’re owed and claims it automatically. No win, no fee. No commitment. No credit card. Product categories: Travel apps.

Scan your inbox for unclaimed flight money from delays, cancellations, overbookings, and more.
Gyro Autopilot finds what you’re owed and claims it automatically.

hot_news.title: Text-Conditional JEPA for Learning Semantically Rich Visual Representations
hot_news.content: Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (I-JEPA) offers a promising approach to visual self-supervised learning through masked feature prediction. However with the inherent visual uncertainty at masked positions, feature prediction remains challenging and may fail ...
hot_news.selection_reason: Apple research on improving visual representations using text-conditional architectures
hot_news.summary: Apple has introduced a text-conditional approach to the Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture to address challenges in masked feature prediction.
hot_news.display_title: Apple Researchers Propose Text-Conditional Architecture to Improve Visual Self-Supervised Learning
key_points: The research builds upon the Image-based Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for visual self-supervised learning.
Standard I-JEPA struggles with visual uncertainty at masked positions, which can cause feature prediction failures.
The new text-conditional method aims to generate semantically richer visual representations by mitigating these prediction challenges.

llm.title: We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity....
llm.content: We’ve agreed to a partnership with @SpaceX that will substantially increase our compute capacity. This, along with our other recent compute deals, means that we’ve been able to increase our usage limits for Claude Code and the Claude API.
llm.selection_reason: Anthropic confirms SpaceX partnership to increase compute capacity and usage limits.

key_points: The partnership with SpaceX is designed to substantially expand Anthropic's overall compute infrastructure.

Claude Code users will also benefit from the increased capacity and higher usage thresholds.

llm.title: We’ve partnered with @AMD, @Broadcom, @Intel, @Microsoft, and @NVIDIA, to release Multipath Relia...
llm.content: We’ve partnered with @AMD, @Broadcom, @Intel, @Microsoft, and @NVIDIA, to release Multipath Reliable Connection (MRC), a new open networking protocol that helps large AI training clusters run faster and more reliably, with less wasted GPU time. https://t.co/AiV952AJXs
llm.selection_reason: OpenAI and industry giants release MRC, a new open protocol for AI supercomputer networking.
llm.summary: OpenAI has collaborated with leading hardware and software companies to introduce Multipath Reliable Connection, an open networking protocol designed to optimize large-scale AI training.
llm.display_title: OpenAI and Major Tech Firms Launch Open Networking Protocol for AI Training Clusters
key_points: The partnership includes major industry players such as AMD, Broadcom, Intel, Microsoft, and NVIDIA.
The protocol aims to increase the overall speed and reliability of large AI training clusters.
Implementing this technology specifically reduces wasted GPU time during intensive model training operations.

llm.title: We’ve developed our own inference engine Runtime-Optimized Serving Engine (ROSE) to serve models...
llm.content: We’ve developed our own inference engine Runtime-Optimized Serving Engine (ROSE) to serve models ranging from embeddings to trillion-parameter LLMs. With CuTeDSL integrated into our inference engine, Perplexity can build the specialized GPU kernels faster to bring models up to peak performance on NVIDIA Hopper and Blackwell GPUs.
llm.selection_reason: Perplexity launches ROSE inference engine and CuTeDSL for optimized GPU performance.
llm.summary: Perplexity has developed a proprietary inference engine called ROSE to efficiently serve AI models ranging from basic embeddings to trillion-parameter architectures.
llm.display_title: Perplexity Unveils Custom Runtime-Optimized Serving Engine for High-Performance AI Model Inference
key_points: The Runtime-Optimized Serving Engine handles diverse models up to trillion-parameter scales.
The system integrates CuTeDSL to accelerate the development of specialized GPU kernels.
The engine is specifically designed to achieve peak performance on NVIDIA Hopper and Blackwell GPUs.

llm.title: RAG framework that eats your entire stack. It's called RAG-Anything. One framework that handles P...
llm.content: RAG framework that eats your entire stack. It's called RAG-Anything. One framework that handles PDFs, Word, PowerPoint, images, tables, and equations in a single pipeline. → No separate parser for tables. → No separate vision model wiring. → No fragile LangChain glue. → Builds a multimodal knowledge graph automatically. 15.1k stars. MIT license. 100% open source.
llm.selection_reason: RAG-Anything is a popular open-source multimodal RAG framework handling complex document types.
llm.summary: RAG-Anything is an open-source framework that processes diverse document formats and builds multimodal knowledge graphs in a single pipeline without requiring separate parsers or vision models.
llm.display_title: Open-Source RAG-Anything Framework Unifies Multimodal Document Parsing Without Complex Integrations
key_points: Handles PDFs, Word documents, PowerPoints, images, tables, and equations natively.
Automatically constructs a multimodal knowledge graph without relying on external integration glue like LangChain.
Available as a fully open-source project under the MIT license with over 15,000 stars.

image_video.title: 完了! 我的整活被官方相中了! 搞了个AI电竞教练的 Harness Agent 框架, 拖进去 CS2 录屏视频后就能分析走位, 身法, 对枪, 预瞄, 投掷物, 经济, 等各种数据, 然后还...
image_video.content: 完了! 我的整活被官方相中了! 搞了个AI电竞教练的 Harness Agent 框架, 拖进去 CS2 录屏视频后就能分析走位, 身法, 对枪, 预瞄, 投掷物, 经济, 等各种数据, 然后还能给出建议和训练方向. 结果被字节跳动相中了, 于是结合 Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite 整了个大活, 连续运行25小时不间断分析对局视频总结玩家的帝王干拉是否到位(x 这次 Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite 的宣发 Demo 视频那个AI电竞教练的就是这个 Demo 哈. 以及, 具体的整活视频还在制作中~ 大家稍安勿躁, 稍后给大家带来全部整活细节~ #seed20lite #doubao #doubaoseed #字节跳动
image_video.selection_reason: AI e-sports coach framework using Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite for real-time video analysis and gaming insights.
image_video.summary: A developer's AI esports coach framework, which analyzes CS2 gameplay videos to provide training advice, was selected by ByteDance to showcase the capabilities of their Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite model.
image_video.display_title: ByteDance Adopts Developer's AI Esports Coach Framework for Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite Demo
key_points: The Harness Agent framework analyzes CS2 screen recordings for positioning, movement, gunfights, pre-aiming, utility usage, and economy.
ByteDance used the framework to create a demo for Doubao-Seed-2.0-Lite, running it continuously for 25 hours to analyze match videos.
A detailed video explaining the full development process and features of the AI esports coach is currently in production.

product_updates.title: We’re rolling out updates to AI Mode and AI Overviews to connect you with relevant links, deep in...
product_updates.content: We’re rolling out updates to AI Mode and AI Overviews to connect you with relevant links, deep insights and original content from across the web: 📝 To help you explore beyond an initial AI response, you’ll start to see suggestions for where to go next, including links to articles and in-depth analyses. 📰 Easily access your favorite sources with a new feature that highlights links from your news subscriptions in AI Mode and AI Overviews. 🔗 Dig deeper into useful websites as you’re reading with more links directly within AI responses — right next to the relevant text. 💻 Get more context with a quick preview of a website when you hover over an inline link in our AI experiences on desktop. You’ll see helpful information, like the name of the website or title of the web page. 💬 AI responses will now include a preview of perspectives from a wide range of online discussions, social media, and other firsthand sources so you can get the most helpful insights. We’re also adding more context to these links, like the name of a creator or community.
product_updates.selection_reason: Major updates to Google AI Overviews including news subscriptions, inline links, and social perspectives.
product_updates.summary: Google is updating its AI Mode and AI Overviews to provide users with more relevant links, inline website previews, and highlighted content from news subscriptions.
product_updates.display_title: Google Enhances AI Mode and Overviews with Deeper Linking and Contextual Previews
key_points: AI responses will now feature suggestions for further reading, including articles and in-depth analyses, to encourage exploration beyond the initial answer.
Desktop users can hover over inline links within AI experiences to see quick previews containing the website name or page title.
The update introduces previews of perspectives from online discussions and social media, adding context such as creator or community names.

product_updates.title: GitHub Copilot in Visual Studio Code, April releases - GitHub Changelog
product_updates.content: VS Code moved to weekly stable releases. This changelog covers releases v1.116 through v1.119, the releases we shipped throughout April and early May 2026. Copilot can now search by meaning…

product_updates.display_title: GitHub Copilot for VS Code Introduces Semantic Search in April Updates

VS Code has transitioned to a weekly stable release schedule.
Copilot now supports semantic search capabilities within the editor.
